title: Meshy Weapon FK Pinning
expectedVisibleBehavior: The sabre hilt remains pinned to the authored WeaponGrip position, not the raw wrist.
The sabre follows the right hand through direct FK child motion.
WeaponGrip local position and quaternion under RightHand remain constant across normal clips.
FPS Weapon.R is reference-only and does not gate runtime acceptance.

checks.command: node tools/pose_lab_offline_render.mjs --actor meshyCharacter --clip "OneHandReady -> meshyCharacter [FPS-VISUAL-IK R-120 L-90]" --samples 4 --assert-fixed

acceptance: Route resolves actor and clip exactly.
Manual weapon placement lock is green.
The offline Meshy saber in-hand case is green before claiming the user-facing issue is fixed.
forbiddenProof: hilt-to-socket pinning without hilt displacement from raw wrist
offline green proof while the live/user screenshot shows the real saber out of hand
